title: Unicorn Under Rainbow Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this medium unicorn under rainbow coloring sheet. Ideal for kids and teens with balanced outlines, natural textures, and a beautiful scenic background. Free printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The unicorn is a legendary creature described since antiquity, symbolizing purity, magic, and untamed strength.
It is the official national animal of Scotland, reflecting the country's love for mythical heritage and independence.
Coloring unicorns encourages creative writing, imagination, and fantasy worldbuilding.
